name: Calculateur Regle 72
desc: Calculez Years to double = 72 / Interest rate (%). Exemple: Interest rate 6% annual = Investment doubles in ≈ 12 years. Calculateur gratuit et précis, sans inscription.

mistakes: Using Rule of for very high interest rates (becomes less accurate)
Not adjusting for inflation when calculeting real doubling time
Forgetting that the rule assumes compound interest, not simple
